prototype_note: First epistemic layer of the Guide Fantastiche system. Introduced in Padova Fantastica as transitional structure between NarrativeSystemGraph v4.1 and full NarrativeProtocol v5.0. Will become mandatory in all future Guide Fantastiche volumes.

book.title: Padova Fantastica
book.author: Grazia Guarnieri
book.introduction_note: Giandomenico Tono, libraio — Libreria Pangea, Padova

editorial_principle: Padova does not organize space around power or commerce but around regimes of knowledge. Every epistemic structure in the city generates a paradox: the more knowledge becomes visible, classified and institutionalized, the more the invisible residue increases.

knowledge_field_types.epistemic_field: system that modifies the conditions under which knowledge becomes perceivable
knowledge_field_types.disciplinary_field: knowledge imposed through bodily or institutional control
knowledge_field_types.cosmological_field: space structured according to symbolic correspondences between microcosm and macrocosm
knowledge_field_types.anatomical_field: knowledge generated through opening, exposure and dissection
knowledge_field_types.protective_field: knowledge preserved through restriction, enclosure or concealment
knowledge_field_types.paradox_field: field where innovation and resistance coexist without resolution

knowledge_fields.label: sapere_che_disseca
knowledge_fields.basho: the Anatomical Theatre transforms the human body into a visible system; knowledge advances through incision and exposure
knowledge_fields.kokyu: the rhythm is vertical and descending: students lean inward toward the opened body in a controlled spiral of attention
knowledge_fields.yūgen: the more the body is revealed, the more the mystery of life increases instead of decreasing
knowledge_fields.activation_condition: presence inside the Anatomical Theatre + awareness of the public dissection ritual
knowledge_fields.field_behavior: the observer becomes simultaneously spectator and potential object of observation

non_integrable_residue.description: scientific visibility never fully resolves existential opacity

affects.object-04: the Bo becomes not only institution but machine for transforming bodies into knowledge
affects.knowledge-03: anatomical knowledge is the most radical expression of the paradox: revealing the body increases rather than reduces mystery

knowledge_fields.textual_anchor_it: Il teatro anatomico è il primo del mondo: il corpo umano diventa oggetto di studio pubblico.

knowledge_fields.label: sapere_che_protegge
knowledge_fields.basho: the Botanical Garden encloses medicinal knowledge within geometric order and defensive walls
knowledge_fields.kokyu: knowledge grows slowly, seasonally, through cultivation rather than revelation
knowledge_fields.yūgen: the wall surrounding the Orto Botanico protects plants but also declares the danger of unrestricted access to knowledge
knowledge_fields.activation_condition: crossing the circular enclosure + recognition of the garden as controlled archive of living matter
knowledge_fields.field_behavior: the observer perceives protection and exclusion as simultaneous conditions of knowledge

non_integrable_residue.description: the wall built against thieves declares the value of what it hides: protective knowledge increases the field of what cannot be accessed

affects.object-05: the symbolic geometry of the Orto becomes operational rather than decorative
affects.knowledge-04: protective enclosure and cosmological geometry share the same circular logic

knowledge_fields.textual_anchor_it: L'armonia, ahimè, viene spesso violata dai ladri a caccia delle preziose piante, quindi nel 1552 si costruisce un alto muro.

knowledge_fields.label: sapere_paradossale
knowledge_fields.basho: Padova generates revolutionary knowledge while structurally resisting innovation; the city stabilizes contradiction instead of resolving it
knowledge_fields.kokyu: every intellectual acceleration is followed by institutional slowing; the rhythm is advance-and-resist without synthesis
knowledge_fields.yūgen: the oldest university in Europe continuously produces the future while remaining structurally attached to the past
knowledge_fields.activation_condition: simultaneous awareness of Padova as avant-garde and conservative system
knowledge_fields.field_behavior: the observer cannot establish whether the city advances or resists change; both readings remain simultaneously active

non_integrable_residue.description: the contradiction between freedom of thought and institutional inertia cannot be resolved without collapsing the identity of the city

affects.object-01: the Scrovegni Chapel is the most extreme expression of paradoxical knowledge: guilt produces beauty
affects.object-04: the University becomes the primary node of epistemic contradiction
affects.silence-01: Bigolina's erasure is the most radical application of paradoxical knowledge: the city's literary primacy is its most invisible

knowledge_fields.textual_anchor_it: Nel 1222 Padova fonda l'Università, la più antica e prestigiosa d'Europa.

knowledge_fields.label: cosmologia_geometrica
knowledge_fields.basho: Padova organizes knowledge spatially through circles, quadrants and axial symmetries; geometry becomes a cognitive map of the universe applied to urban space
knowledge_fields.kokyu: the rhythm is centripetal: all movement tends toward symbolic centers — the island of the Prato, the inner garden of the Orto
knowledge_fields.yūgen: the city repeatedly uses perfect forms to contain unstable human systems; the geometry never fully controls what it encloses
knowledge_fields.activation_condition: recognition of circular and axial structures in both Prato della Valle and Orto Botanico as the same perceptual logic
knowledge_fields.field_behavior: the observer begins unconsciously mapping Padova through symbolic geometry rather than streets or monuments

affects.object-03: Prato della Valle becomes navigable as cosmological device rather than piazza
affects.object-05: the Orto Botanico becomes perceptual mandala — the same circle applied to living matter

knowledge_fields.textual_anchor_it: La struttura dell'Orto è fortemente simbolica: un quadrato suddiviso in quattro quadranti da due assi perpendicolari e inscritto in un cerchio.

system_note.system_shift: from urban stratification to epistemic paradox
system_note.major_mutation: the city no longer modifies only perception but also the conditions of knowing
system_note.migration_note: NarrativeKnowledgeField will become mandatory in all future Guide Fantastiche volumes starting from protocol v5.0
